notes: B2Sign is a trade-only wholesale printer selling exclusively to resellers. Pricing requires a reseller account login and is not publicly displayed. All product data was extracted from public-facing product pages. Product catalog PDF: https://www.b2sign.com/files/2024_catelog.pdf. Template user guide: https://www.b2sign.com/downloadable/6ead22206e5fb52493bc3f00056e7a6822d33eb5

fulfillment.bulk_note: Orders over 100 qty require 2 additional business days

file_requirements.notes: Submit artwork at ordered dimensions. No crop marks, bleeds, or Pantone spot colors.
